testset.description:
flowchart TD 0:startevent:((startevent)) --> 1:task:(Record customer specifications blade lenght, chain width, drive type, power, weight) 1:task:(Record customer specifications blade lenght, chain width, drive type, power, weight) --> 2:parallelgateway:{AND} 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 3:task:(Order guide bar) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 4:task:(Order saw chain) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 5:task:(Order engine or electric motor) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 6:task:(Order housing) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 7:task:(Order safety components) 3:task:(Order guide bar) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 4:task:(Order saw chain) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 5:task:(Order engine or electric motor) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 6:task:(Order housing) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 7:task:(Order safety components) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 8:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 9:task:(Check all parts manually) 9:task:(Check all parts manually) --> 10:task:(Send production update to customer) 10:task:(Send production update to customer) --> 11:task:(Assemble parts) 11:task:(Assemble parts) --> 12:task:(Send production update to customer) 12:task:(Send production update to customer) --> 13:task:(Send first saw to customer) 13:task:(Send first saw to customer) --> 14:task:(Collect customer feedback) 14:task:(Collect customer feedback) --> 15:exclusivegateway:{x} 15:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Customer satisfied|16:task:(Produce remaining order) 15:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Customer not satisfied|17:endevent:(((endevent))) 16:task:(Produce remaining order) --> 18:task:(Send production update to customer) 18:task:(Send production update to customer) --> 19:task:(Send remaining order to customer) 19:task:(Send remaining order to customer) --> 20:endevent:(((endevent)))
Record customer specifications blade lenght, chain width, drive type, power, weight
:task
Order guide bar
:task
Order saw chain
:task
Order engine or electric motor
:task
Order housing
:task
Order safety components
:task
Check all parts manually
:task
Send production update to customer
:task
Assemble parts
:task
Send production update to customer
:task
Send first saw to customer
:task
Collect customer feedback
:task
Produce remaining order
:task
Send production update to customer
:task
Send remaining order to customer
:task
